name: Bible-api
description: Look up user-entered Bible passages, browse a chapter in a selected translation, or request a random verse.

tools.name: get_passage
tools.description: Retrieve a Bible verse or passage using a human-readable reference.

params.name: passage
params.description: URL-encoded Bible reference such as john 3:16 or matt 25:31-33,46.

params.name: translation
params.description: Supported translation identifier such as web or kjv; defaults to web.

params.name: single_chapter_book_matching
params.description: Set to indifferent to interpret an ambiguous single-chapter book reference as a chapter or whole book.

tools.name: get_chapter
tools.description: Retrieve all verses in one chapter using precise translation and book identifiers.

params.name: translation_id
params.description: Translation identifier such as web or kjv.

params.name: book_id
params.description: Book identifier such as GEN or JHN.

tools.name: get_random_verse
tools.description: Retrieve a random verse from a translation.

params.name: translation_id
params.description: Translation identifier such as web or kjv.
